arts.ttl: Manager tells Tottenham man to ‘find right place’ – Explains what player needs to ‘perform well’
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s Alejo Véliz has been out on loan since January 2024, six months after joining the Premier League club from Rosario Central. Tottenham first let the striker join Sevilla before sanctioning a season-long loan move to Espanyol last summer. He’s played 1,171 minutes in 24 games for Espanyol, scoring four goals. arts.ttl: “I had a great time” – Player loved Chelsea and Crystal Palace spells, can’t wait to take on Tottenham
arts.sum: Michy Batshuayi has insisted that he loved his time in London with Chelsea and Crystal Palace and is now looking forward to a return to take on Tottenham. The striker has been speaking to Eintracht Frankfurt’s official website as the gear up to take on Tottenham in the Europa League quarterfinals. arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on Van de Ven, why he substituted Bergvall, VAR and his mistake
arts.sum: I purposely, I think since VAR came in up in Scotland and in the first game there was four or five incidents and we were standing around, I made a conscience decision that I'm not going to really celebrate goals as there's no point as you have to wait for everything to get checked off. At the same time, I understand criticism towards me because I am in charge of the whole thing, but if anyone looks at those players last night and thought they weren’t trying or somehow they resigned themselves to their fate then I am sorry they weren’t watching the right game.
